top_signals.title: Training Ship Golden Bear Returns Home from Final Summer Sea Term for Cal Poly Maritime Academy
top_signals.summary: Training Ship Golden Bear returns to Vallejo on July 6 following the completion of Summer Sea Term 2026, bringing home 283 Cal Poly Maritime Academy cadets after a 12,500-mile voyage across the Pacific Ocean. After 30 years of service as the academy's primary training vessel…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Led by Buc-ee’s and new rival Dolly Parton, America’s gas station chains are in a mega-sizing era
top_signals.summary: Gas station chains led by Buc-ee's are coming closer to rivaling America's big box stores in size, and Dolly Parton is getting in on the retail trend.

top_signals.title: CMA CGM Celebrates Naming NOTRE DAME, the Largest French-Flagged Containership
top_signals.summary: The CMA CGM Group celebrated the naming ceremony of the CMA CGM NOTRE DAME in Le Havre, the newest vessel in its fleet.Measuring nearly 400 meters in length, 61 meters in width and with a capacity of up to 24,000 TEUs, the CMA CGM NOTRE DAME…

top_signals.title: Launch of UK's National Cyber Action Plan delayed amid Labour leadership crisis
top_signals.summary: The plan had been due for publication on Monday, the sources said. It has been postponed amid the uncertainty over the governing Labour Party’s leadership contest, which opens July 9.

alerts.title: Great Lakes Iron Ore Trade Increased in June 2026
alerts.summary: Shipments of iron ore on the Great Lakes increased 4.5 percent from June of last year to 5.1 million tons. Shipments were a near match to the month’s 5-year average.Year-to-date, the iron ore trade stands at 17.3 million tons, an increase of 4.2 percent compared to 2025.
